summary: Comprehensive testing of Farrari Laundries website - All features working correctly. Backend APIs (contact, franchise-register) tested with 14/14 tests passing. Frontend UI tested including hero slider navigation, app benefit cards, branches search/map, contact form, franchise form, and all page navigation.

issues: Image in step 1 (Place an Order) appears blank/not loading in some cases - may be external image URL issue

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
OS detection for app links is implemented correctly using getAppLink utility
Form submissions properly integrate with backend APIs via Resend email service
OpenStreetMap integration works correctly for branch locations
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API calls during testing (contact form, franchise form submissions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Hero slider with 4 slides and navigation, App benefit cards with mobile display switching, How It Works scroll animations, Branches page with search and OpenStreetMap modal, Contact form with Resend email integration, Franchise registration form, All page navigation (Home, About, Services, Branches, FAQ, Franchising, Contact, Terms, Privacy). Backend APIs /api/contact and /api/franchise-register both working with real Resend email delivery.

hero_slider.details: Prev/next buttons work, slide indicators work, Order Now buttons on all slides link to app stores

app_section.details: Benefit card selection (gift, promos, cashless, rewards) changes mobile display image correctly

how_it_works.details: Scroll animations trigger on scroll, Order Now button links to app store

branches_page.details: Search filters branches correctly, clicking branch opens map modal with OpenStreetMap, no results message shows for invalid search

contact_form.details: Form submission sends email via backend API, success toast displayed, form clears after submission

franchise_form.details: Form submission sends email via backend API, success toast displayed, form clears after submission

navigation.details: All nav links work (Home, About, Services, Branches, FAQ, Franchising, Contact)

footer_links.details: Google Play and App Store download buttons link to correct app pages

header_order_now.details: Uses OS detection via getAppLink utility

terms_privacy_pages.details: Both pages load correctly with proper content
